metadata.title: Obrii Studio — Video Production & Social Media Agency
metadata.description: We create stunning video content and social media strategies for businesses and individuals.

hero.headline: We craft visual stories that
hero.subheadline: A boutique video production and social media agency dedicated to elevating brands through meticulous craftsmanship and timeless aesthetics.

manifesto.title: Our Philosophy
manifesto.heading: The art is in the restraint
manifesto.text: Every brand has a story worth telling. We don't just produce content — we sculpt visual experiences that resonate, inspire, and convert. In a world drowning in noise, we create signal.

services.title: What We Do
services.subtitle: Precision-crafted services for brands that demand excellence.

video.title: Video Production
video.description: From concept to final cut. Commercial videos, brand films, product showcases, and event coverage that captivate your audience.

social.title: Social Media Content
social.description: Scroll-stopping content engineered for engagement. Reels, stories, and posts designed to grow your digital presence.

smm.title: Social Media Management
smm.description: Full-cycle social media strategy. We plan, create, publish, and analyze — so you can focus on your business.

featuredWork.title: Featured Work
featuredWork.subtitle: Selected projects that showcase our craft.

process.title: The transparency layer
process.subtitle: A transparent, collaborative workflow designed to deliver results.

steps.title: Briefing
steps.description: We listen. Understanding your goals, audience, and vision is the foundation of every great project.

steps.title: Production
steps.description: Cameras roll. Our team brings the creative vision to life with professional equipment and experienced direction.

steps.title: Post-Production
steps.description: The magic happens. Editing, color grading, sound design, and motion graphics transform raw footage into art.

steps.title: Delivery
steps.description: Launch ready. Final files optimized for every platform, with revisions until you're completely satisfied.

packages.name: Starter
packages.description: Perfect for small businesses starting with video.

packages.name: Professional
packages.description: For brands ready to make an impact.

personalCta.title: Let's discuss your next project
personalCta.text: Every great collaboration starts with a conversation. Tell us about your vision, and let's explore how we can bring it to life together.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your project. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.

form.name: Your Name

footer.tagline: Crafting visual stories that move people.
